title: A Thought Went Up My Mind To-Day
content:
A thought went up my mind to-day
    That I have had before,
    But did not finish, -- some way back,
    I could not fix the year,

    Nor where it went, nor why it came
    The second time to me,
    Nor definitely what it was,
    Have I the art to say.

    But somewhere in my soul, I know
    I 've met the thing before;
    It just reminded me -- 't was all --
    And came my way no more.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "A Thought Went Up My Mind To-Day", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
